The next day I noticed a lot as if these rooms had never been vacuumed... they looked neat, but they were dusty. Book twin bed, means there are 2 people.. but one cup. There are no towels or floor mats, just go out of the bathroom and the floor is wet.. There are mosquitoes in the room. I've already killed 2, there are still more, it's hard to chase.. Checkin was easy and smooth on the G floor, there is a KMart Parking basement rm2.20 per hour!

Original_Text: B tempat berdekatan dengan pavilion. Staff ada yang mesra ada yang tak.. bilik kecil kalau ada family. Lift diadakan setelah register di lobby tingkat 1. Susah untuk bawa naik lugguge menggunakan tangga.

Original_Text: 我凌晨到达的酒店，因为我个人的操作定错了一个日期。我询问能不能让我更改一下让我今天入住，酒店工作人员拒绝了我更换日期的要求，并且无法退款。我与agoda交涉，agoda表示只能退给我一部分，最后也没有退还我的钱。我不得不支付了两晚的价格。这家店在这点非常流氓
Translated_Text: I arrived at the hotel early in the morning and set the wrong date due to my personal operation. I asked if I could change the date so that I could check in today. The hotel staff refused my request to change the date and no refund could be given. I negotiated with agoda, and agoda said it could only refund part of it to me. In the end, it did not refund my money. I had to pay the price for two nights. This store is very rogue in this regard

Original_Text: チェックインより早く到着しました。荷物を預かってもらえないかと頼んだが、置いて行っても構わないが私しかいないからどうなっても一切責任は負わないと言われて仕方なく荷物を持ったままチェックインの時間まで外にいました。チェックイン時間を過ぎてもチェックインできずやっと入れたと思ったらカビ臭い掃除していない、水回りなど壊れている部屋に案内されました。廊下から爆音で音楽が聴こえてくるし、疲れている中、全てにおいて精神的環境に悪いので３泊分支払っていましたが泊まらずチェックアウトしました。もちろん返金もありませんでした。
Translated_Text: I arrived earlier than check-in. I asked if they could keep my luggage, but I was told that I could leave it there, but since I was the only one there, they wouldn't take any responsibility for what happened, so I had no choice but to stay outside with my luggage until check-in time. I couldn't check in even after the check-in time, and when I thought I finally got in, I was shown to a room that smelled of mold, had not been cleaned, and had broken plumbing. I could hear loud music coming from the hallway, and while I was tired, everything was bad for my mental health, so I checked out without staying even though I had paid for three nights. Of course there was no refund.
